zh.lifeSummary: 當Galfride "Geoffrey" Conyers Lord Of Bishopton Lord Of Sockburn於1165年出生在英國達勒姆索可本時，他的父親Roger Conyers III30歲，母親Albreda of norton25歲。他於1185年與Elinor Lilbourn結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1238年在英國達勒姆享年73歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Galfride "Geoffrey" Conyers Lord Of Bishopton Lord Of Sockburn于1165年出生在英国達勒姆索可本时，他的父亲Roger Conyers III30岁，母亲Albreda of norton25岁。他于1185年与Elinor Lilbourn结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1238年在英国達勒姆享年73岁。

nameMeanings.name: Conyers
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Yorkshire, of Norman origin): habitational name from either of two places in northern France, Coignières in Seine-et-Oise or Cogners in Sarthe. Alternatively, a variant of Conyer , with genitival or post-medieval excrescent -s.

variants.name: Conyer
meanings: English: occupational name for a minter, a coiner of money, from an agent derivative of Old French coignier ‘to stamp money, to mint’.

nameMeanings.name: "Geoffrey"
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Of Germanic (Frankish and Lombard) origin, introduced to Britain by the Normans. It was in regular use among the counts of Anjou, ancestors of the English royal house of Plantagenet, who were descended from Geoffrey Plantagenet, Count of Anjou ( 1113–51 ). It was a particularly popular name in England and France in the later Middle Ages; notable bearers in England include the poet Geoffrey Chaucer ( c.1340–1400 ) and in Wales the chronicler Geoffrey of Monmouth ( d. 1155 ). The original form and meaning of the name is disputed. According to one theory, it is merely a variant of Godfrey ; others derive the first part from the Germanic word gawia ‘territory’, walah ‘stranger’, or gisil ‘pledge’. Medieval forms can be found to support all these theories, and it is possible that several names have fallen together, or that the name was subjected to reanalysis by folk etymology at an early date.

historicEvents.title: Magna Carta
historicEvents.description: King John of England agreed to a charter of rights called the Magna Carta. The document was originally drafted by the Archbishop of Canterbury to establish peace between King John and a group of rebel barons. The Magna Carta was completed in 1215 and is now considered to be one of the greatest constitutional documents of all time.

historicEvents.title: France Declares War on England
historicEvents.description: France declared war on England as Louis VIII of France attacked Poitou and northern Gascony.

en.lifeSummary: When Galfride "Geoffrey" Conyers Lord Of Bishopton Lord Of Sockburn was born in 1165, in Sockburn, Durham, England, his father, Roger Conyers III, was 30 and his mother, Albreda of norton, was 25. He married Elinor Lilbourn in 1185. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 1 daughter. He died in 1238, in Durham, England, at the age of 73.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Galfride "Geoffrey" Conyers Lord Of Bishopton Lord Of Sockburn est né en 1165, à Sockburn, Durham, Angleterre, son père, Roger Conyers III, avait 30 ans et sa mère, Albreda of norton, avait 25 ans. Il a épousé Elinor Lilbourn en 1185. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé en 1238, à Durham, Angleterre, à l’âge de 73 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Galfride "Geoffrey" Conyers Lord Of Bishopton Lord Of Sockburn 1165 in Sockburn, Durham, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Roger Conyers III 30 und seine Mutter Albreda of norton 25. Er hat 1185 Elinor Lilbourn geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb 1238 im Alter von 73 Jahren in Durham, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Galfride "Geoffrey" Conyers Lord Of Bishopton Lord Of Sockburn è nato il nel 1165 nel Sockburn, Durham, England, il suo padre, Roger Conyers III, aveva 30 anni e il suo madre, Albreda of norton, aveva 25 anni. Lui sposato Elinor Lilbourn nel 1185. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 1 figlia. Morì nel 1238, nel Durham, England, all'età di 73 anni.

ko.lifeSummary: Galfride "Geoffrey" Conyers Lord Of Bishopton Lord Of Sockburn(이)가 1165년 영국 뒤람 속번에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Roger Conyers III(은)는 30세였고, 그의 어머니 Albreda of norton(은)는 25세였다. 그는 1185년 Elinor Lilbourn(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1238년 영국 뒤람에서 73세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Galfride "Geoffrey" Conyers Lord Of Bishopton Lord Of Sockburn nasceu em 1165, em Sockburn, Durham, Inglaterra, seu pai, Roger Conyers III, tinha 30 anos e sua mãe, Albreda of norton, tinha 25 anos. Ele casou-se com Elinor Lilbourn em 1185. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 1238, em Durham, Inglaterra, com 73 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Galfride "Geoffrey" Conyers Lord Of Bishopton Lord Of Sockburn родился в 1165 г. в местности соккбурн, дурам, Англия, его отцу по имени Roger Conyers III было 30 лет, а матери, которую звали Albreda of norton, 25. Он женился на женщине по имени Elinor Lilbourn в 1185 г. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 1 дочь. Он умер в 1238 г. в местности дурам, Англия в возрасте 73 лет.

Se casó con Elinor Lilbourn en 1185. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 1 hija. Murió en 1238, en Durham, Inglaterra, a la edad de 73 años.
